tasks.title: Remove includeBuild from samples-java
tasks.description: Once temporal-spring-ai is published to Maven Central, remove the includeBuild('../sdk-java') block from samples-java/settings.gradle and the grpc-util workaround from core/build.gradle.
tasks.notes: Blocked on SDK release. Not actionable yet.

tasks.title: Change default tool execution to run in workflow context
tasks.description: Currently unannotated tools passed to defaultTools() are rejected. Change so they execute directly in workflow context by default — user is responsible for determinism. Remove @DeterministicTool annotation (no longer needed since direct execution is the default). Remove SandboxingAdvisor and LocalActivityToolCallbackWrapper. Keep @SideEffectTool as a convenience for wrapping in Workflow.sideEffect(). Keep activity stub / nexus stub auto-detection as shortcuts.
tasks.notes: Blocked on PR review discussion with tconley1428. Agreed on direction but need to finalize details before implementing. Proposed design: https://github.com/temporalio/sdk-java/pull/2829#discussion_r3060711651

tasks.title: Discuss: temporal-spring-ai-starter artifact for easier onboarding
tasks.description: temporal-sdk is compileOnly, so users must declare it separately. DABH asks if a starter that pulls in the right transitive deps would reduce friction. Need to decide if this is worth it or if documentation is sufficient.
tasks.notes: DABH review comment: https://github.com/temporalio/sdk-java/pull/2829/files#r3053808755. Discuss with Don.

tasks.title: Discuss: ActivityMcpClient capability caching and replay
tasks.description: ActivityMcpClient caches getServerCapabilities() after first call. DABH asks if stale cache is a replay concern. Probably fine (activity result is in history, so replay uses the original value — which is correct). But worth confirming the design intent.
tasks.notes: DABH review comment: https://github.com/temporalio/sdk-java/pull/2829/files#r3054027377. Discuss with Don.

tasks.title: Discuss: Change ChatModelTypes.rawContent from Object to String
tasks.description: rawContent is Object but always cast to String. DABH suggests making it String. Cleaner but changes the JSON schema. If we ever need non-string content (multimodal), we'd have to change it back.
tasks.notes: DABH review comment: https://github.com/temporalio/sdk-java/pull/2829/files#r3054049714. Discuss with Don.

tasks.title: Reply: compatibility matrix in docs
tasks.description: DABH suggests documenting the compatibility matrix (Java version, Spring Boot version, Spring AI version). Acknowledge and defer to a docs PR.

tasks.title: Reply: SandboxingAdvisor lacks tests
tasks.description: DABH notes SandboxingAdvisor has no tests. Likely moot if T15 removes it. Reply explaining that.
tasks.notes: DABH review comment: https://github.com/temporalio/sdk-java/pull/2829/files#r3053836427 Moot once T15 removes these classes.

tasks.title: Reply: ToolContext silently dropped in LocalActivityToolCallbackWrapper
tasks.description: DABH notes ToolContext is silently ignored. Likely moot if T15 removes LocalActivityToolCallbackWrapper. Reply explaining that.
tasks.notes: DABH review comment: https://github.com/temporalio/sdk-java/pull/2829/files#r3054036773 Moot once T15 removes these classes.

tasks.title: Restore VectorStorePlugin and EmbeddingModelPlugin as public classes
tasks.description: Restore the plugin subclasses so users not using auto-config can create them manually (e.g. new VectorStorePlugin(vectorStore)). Auto-config uses them too. Reverts the builder-inline approach from the earlier refactor.
tasks.notes: tconley1428 review comments on SpringAiPlugin.java and SpringAiVectorStoreAutoConfiguration.java
